title: Stop AW task-shape label ownership

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1359 so AW startup, implement, delegation, and report surfaces stop presenting semantic task-shape labels as AW-owned decisions.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not add better keyword classification. Keep AW-owned outputs to observed facts, hard gates, recommendations, candidate routes, and evidence/guidance with agent-owned semantic judgment.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: How to rename or reshape existing fields while preserving compatibility where necessary and making authority boundaries explicit.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires a broad Planning skill taxonomy rewrite, changing hard gate behavior, or removing intentional Planning artifact terms such as execplan/decomposition/lane.
canonical_core.next_action: No implementation continuation remains for this archived slice; review and merge the PR, then rebase #1354 onto the fix.
completion_criteria: No startup, implement, delegation, or report packet presents task-shape labels as AW-owned semantic decisions.
Structural/task signals are exposed as evidence or guidance with explicit agent-owned classification.
Focused tests cover #1359 and the #1354-like under-interpretation failure.

goal: Implement #1359 so AW no longer presents task-shape labels as package-owned decisions.
non_goals: Do not continue #1354 on this branch; do not rewrite broader Planning artifact terminology in this slice.

intent.outcome: Implement #1359 so AW stops owning semantic task-shape labels.
intent.constraints: Expose facts/guidance only; do not implement keyword-based task classification.
intent.latitude: Rename or reshape packet fields and tests to preserve agent-owned judgment.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the fix expands into a broad Planning skill or artifact terminology redesign.

execution.next_step: Review and merge the PR, then rebase #1354 onto the fix.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
